subcodes.first_line: O divine victory! In truth thou hast exerted the utmost effort in service to the Lord of Verses in every respect [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نصر الهی فی الحقیقه در خدمات رب الایات از هر جهت نهایت همت را مبذول داشتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
